description.en: ETH_P_ALL can be used in the socket constructor as proto for the AF_PACKET family in order to capture every packet, regardless of protocol. For more information, see the packet(7) manpage. Availability: Linux. Added in version 3.12.

description.en: A deprecated alias of OSError. Changed in version 3.3: Following PEP 3151, this class was made an alias of OSError.
